topic: I throw out the same expired can of soup every week and it keeps coming back to my pantry
title: I Throw Out the Same Expired Can of Soup Every Week and It Keeps Coming Back | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: I throw out the same can of expired soup every week. It comes back by Sunday.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a single dusty can of soup on a wooden pantry shelf, an expired date faintly visible on the lid, dim pantry light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Kitchen pantry. Built ins. Twelve shelves. Lived in this house since two thousand nine.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a kitchen pantry with built in shelves stocked with dry goods, dim under cabinet light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of gloved hands wiping down a pantry shelf with a cloth, no face visible, dim pantry light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Found the can during last March's clean out. Cream of mushroom. Best by nineteen ninety.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of an old can of cream of mushroom soup with a faded best by date stamp showing nineteen ninety, dust visible on the rim, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of a metal kitchen trash can in a garage with a dented soup can visible at the top, dim afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Sunday it was back. Same dent. Same dust.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a pantry shelf the next Sunday, the same dusty soup can sitting on it as if untouched, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Took it to recycling. Watched them crush it.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a metal recycling crusher with a flattened soup can on a conveyor belt, industrial dim lighting, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The following Sunday. Same can. Same dent. Same dust.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a pantry shelf showing the same dusty soup can intact, the dent in the same position as before, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Started marking the can with permanent marker. Different mark every week.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a permanent marker scribbling a small mark on the side of an upright soup can on a wooden countertop, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: All eight marks are now visible on the same can. It has not been replaced.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a soup can with eight small permanent marker marks running down its side, dust visible on its surface, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have stopped throwing it out.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a kitchen pantry shelf with a single dusty soup can in the center, the can the only item on the shelf, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week I noticed the dust is fresh now. Settling in real time.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a soup can on a pantry shelf with a fine layer of fresh dust just settling on its top, vertical 9:16 framing
